episode_title: Friday watchlist: Canva AI 2.0 points to AI becoming part of the whole content workflow
selected_story_title: Canva AI 2.0 is in research preview
selection_reason: This is the strongest practical story in the set for creators and small businesses because it moves AI beyond one-off generation and into editing, organization, and publishing workflows that people can actually test this week. It is also explicitly a preview, which fits the edition’s theme of useful features with clear limits.
first_spoken_line: If you have been waiting for an AI story that is less about giant model hype and more about actual day-to-day work, this is the one to watch.
final_spoken_line: Either way, the signal is clear: AI is becoming more useful when it gets narrower, more editable, and easier to review. That is the version to pay attention to this week.
